name: lobehub
desc: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

name: codex-turbo
desc: Codex CLI 多智能体并行调度配置参考模板——启用原生并行能力，实现主代理自主协调与子代理高效任务分发。Codex CLI Multi-Agent Parallel Scheduling Configuration Reference Template Enabling Native Parallelism for Autonomous Primary Agent Coordination and Efficient Sub-Agent Task Distribution.

name: notebooklm-py
desc: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.
